title: Gateway
description: Configure the core settings for your proxy gateway.
network.heading: Network
network.host.label: Host
network.host.description: The address the gateway binds to.
network.port.label: Port
network.port.description: The port the gateway listens on.
logging.heading: Logging
logging.level.label: Log Level
logging.level.description: Controls the verbosity of gateway output.
behavior.heading: Behavior
behavior.cleanup.label: Cleanup on Stop
behavior.cleanup.description: Remove the working directory when the gateway stops.
behavior.workDir.label: Work Directory
behavior.workDir.description: Directory used for runtime files. Leave empty to use a temporary directory.
logLevels.trace.label: Trace
logLevels.trace.description: Everything, including very chatty transport traces.
logLevels.debug.label: Debug
logLevels.info.label: Info
logLevels.warn.label: Warn
logLevels.error.label: Error
logLevels.error.description: Only failures that need immediate action.
